file_structure.description: Helm chart values or manifest for CloudNative-PG operator
CloudNative-PG Cluster Custom Resource definition for sigma1-postgres
Helm chart values or manifest for Valkey/Redis operator
Redis Custom Resource definition for sigma1-valkey
Template for Kubernetes secret 'sigma1-db-secret' (manual creation/copy from operator-generated secret)
ConfigMap to store infrastructure connection endpoints
Configuration for S3/R2 bucket and IAM policies

scaffolds.test_stubs:
# Verify Namespace creation
kubectl get ns sigma1

# Verify PostgreSQL Cluster health
kubectl get cluster sigma1-postgres -n sigma1
kubectl describe cluster sigma1-postgres -n sigma1 | grep 'Healthy'

# Verify Valkey/Redis instance is running
kubectl get redis sigma1-valkey -n sigma1
kubectl describe redis sigma1-valkey -n sigma1 | grep 'Ready'

# Verify ConfigMap content
kubectl get configmap sigma1-infra-endpoints -n sigma1 -o yaml

# Verify S3/R2 bucket creation (manual check or cloud provider CLI)
# e.g., `aws s3api head-bucket --bucket sigma1-assets` or `r2 ls`
